title: {{title}}

routes_claimed.description: Routes or surfaces the PR claims to cover
routes_claimed.default: Not stated in the PR body

design_refs.description: Named design references claimed by the PR
design_refs.default: Not stated in the PR body

author_validation.description: Validation the author claims to have run
author_validation.default: Not stated in the PR body

review_goal.default: Confirm route coverage honesty, validation evidence, and remaining risks for a frontend change.

steps.title: Check route coverage and deferred routes for PR #{{pr_number}}
steps.description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- You can name the actual routes touched by the branch.
- You can name sibling routes that remain intentionally old or incomplete.
- The PR body avoids app-wide claims for route-local work.

steps.title: Check design references and shared-contract claims for PR #{{pr_number}}
steps.description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Touched routes were compared against named design references.
- Shared shell or shared contract changes are called out explicitly.
- The PR does not describe a local visual polish pass as shared-shell parity.

steps.title: Check state coverage and stress behavior for PR #{{pr_number}}
steps.description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Fresh-thread, existing-thread, realistic success, and long-content stress states were checked.
- If chat or tool-rendering UI changed, long raw payloads and scroll ownership were checked.
- The branch does not introduce horizontal overflow or hidden transcript controls.

steps.title: Check validation evidence and Beads synchronization for PR #{{pr_number}}
steps.description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Automated checks in the PR body match what was actually run.
- Closed Beads tasks match what was actually delivered.
- Follow-up work is linked explicitly instead of left implicit.

steps.title: Record findings or approval outcome for PR #{{pr_number}}
steps.description:
Acceptance Criteria:
- Real findings are created as durable discovered-from issues when needed.
- Blocking issues are attached back to this review task.
- Approval or change-request outcome is recorded in the PR and Beads state.
